## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and production updates.](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [38 articles ready for review, 4 more coming this week; production pace adjusted for review bandwidth](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [New stablecoin and LATAM topics added to Airtable for content planning](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Clarified distinctions between settlement vs. payouts, pre vs. post-product content](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Identified specific articles needing updates vs. rewrites, with special handling for partner-approved content](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [38 articles ready for review in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [4 more articles to be delivered this week](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Production pace slowed to allow for review bandwidth](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Articles generated with new artifacts marked as "V. June, 11th, August"](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [New topics added to Airtable in batches to manage volume](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

### Analytics Discussion

  - [Clarified difference between "sessions" and "engaged sessions" in GA4](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Engaged sessions defined as 1+ minute on page or clicking to another site link](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Rapyd's engaged session rate above 50% benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Suggestion to customize engaged session definition for product pages](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)

### Stablecoin Content Strategy

  - [Focused on general educational content pre-product launch](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Emphasis on Rapyd's payout capabilities, not acceptance](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Key topics: stablecoin backing, regulations (MICA, Genius Act), volatility protection](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Caution against promoting features Rapyd doesn't offer (e.g., 24/7 settlement)](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Clarification needed on Rapyd's specific stablecoin settlement capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### LATAM Market Content

  - [Shift from combining LATAM and stablecoin topics to separate, focused articles](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Emphasis on how global companies can access LATAM markets without local presence](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Plans for country-specific deep dives (Mexico, Brazil, Colombia, Chile, Argentina)](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Request for a generic Central America article](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Existing country guides to be updated rather than creating new articles](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

### Content Refresh Process

  - [Manual screening process to identify existing content for updates](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [Preference for rewrites while maintaining original URLs for SEO equity](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [Special handling for partner-approved content (e.g., Apple Pay, PayFac articles)](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kristin to clarify Rapyd's stablecoin settlement capabilities and timing](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Vivek to continue adding topics to Airtable list weekly](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
  - [Team to focus on updating existing country guides rather than creating new ones](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [Special care to be taken when updating partner-approved content (Apple Pay, PayFac)](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
  - [Implement clearer distinctions between settlement and payout terminology in content](https://fathom.video/share/78zdy9gQ7-6qya5Qx89vtvw-vhW-N8xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
